title: Create 3D first-person shooter game

requirements.text: Implement a 3D first-person shooter game environment using React Three Fiber with controllable player movement (WASD keys for forward/backward/strafe, mouse for looking around)
acceptanceCriteria: Player can move in all directions using WASD keys
Mouse controls camera rotation for looking around
Movement is smooth and responsive

requirements.text: Add shooting mechanics with visual feedback including muzzle flash, projectile trajectories, and hit detection against targets
acceptanceCriteria: Left mouse click fires weapon
Visible projectile or raycast effect when shooting
Muzzle flash animation appears on firing
Hits are detected on target objects

requirements.text: Create a 3D game arena with obstacles, cover positions, and environmental geometry for tactical gameplay
acceptanceCriteria: Arena contains walls, obstacles, and cover objects
Player collision prevents walking through solid objects
Environment provides tactical positioning opportunities

requirements.text: Implement enemy targets or NPCs that can be destroyed when shot, with visual feedback for hits and destruction
acceptanceCriteria: Enemy targets are visible in the arena
Targets react visually when hit
Targets are removed or show destroyed state after sufficient damage

requirements.text: Add game state management tracking player health, ammunition count, score, and enemy defeats
acceptanceCriteria: Player health is tracked and displayed
Ammunition count decreases with each shot
Score increases when enemies are defeated
Game state persists across sessions via backend

requirements.text: Display HUD elements showing crosshair, health bar, ammunition counter, and current score
acceptanceCriteria: Crosshair appears at screen center
Health bar shows current player health
Ammo counter displays remaining ammunition
Score is visible and updates in real-time

requirements.text: Apply a timeless, ethereal visual aesthetic with muted colors, atmospheric lighting, and a sense of suspended time to create a distinctive art style
acceptanceCriteria: Visual style uses desaturated or muted color palette
Lighting creates atmospheric, dreamlike ambiance
Overall aesthetic feels timeless rather than contemporary
Consistent art direction applied to all 3D assets and UI elements

constraints: Must use React Three Fiber for all 3D rendering
All game logic must run client-side in the frontend
Backend should only handle persistent data storage (scores, player progress)

required: Ethereal muzzle flash effect with soft glow in muted gold tones (muzzle-flash.dim_256x256.png)
Atmospheric skybox texture with timeless, foggy environment in pale blue and gray (skybox.dim_2048x2048.png)
Crosshair overlay design with minimalist style in semi-transparent white (crosshair.dim_64x64.png)
